welcome.content: 👋 Schools, please complete this questionnaire to provide a holistic overview of {student_name}, including their learning profile as well as their social, emotional, mental health, speech and language and sensory needs.

context_1.question: Please provide the name and role of the person completing this form.

context_2.question: Which of the following best describes your professional relationship with the student?
context_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

context_3.question: Which of the following best describes the type of school?
context_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

context_4.question: At what point did the student join this school?

options.label: Continued from primary phase of same school

context_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

attendance_1.question: How would you describe the student's attendance over the last 12 months?
attendance_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

attendance_2.question: Where attendance has been irregular, please describe any known reasons.

attendance_3.question: To your knowledge, has the student ever been placed on a reduced timetable?

attendance_3_detail.question: If so, please provide further detail.

attendance_4.question: Which of the following best describes the predominant language spoken by the student?
attendance_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

curriculum_1.question: How would you describe the student's overall attainment in English?
curriculum_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

curriculum_2.question: How would you describe the student's attainment in reading?
curriculum_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

curriculum_3.question: How would you describe the student's attainment in writing?
curriculum_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

curriculum_4.question: How would you describe the student's attainment in handwriting?
curriculum_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

curriculum_5.question: How would you describe the student's overall attainment in Maths?
curriculum_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

curriculum_6.question: How would you describe the student's overall attainment in Science?
curriculum_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

curriculum_7.question: Where setting or streaming applies, what is the student's set placement in English?
curriculum_7.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

curriculum_8.question: Where setting or streaming applies, what is the student's set placement in Maths?
curriculum_8.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

curriculum_9.question: Where setting or streaming applies, what is the student's set placement in Science?
curriculum_9.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

skills_1.question: Based on your observations, how would you describe the student's skill in reading aloud?
skills_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

skills_2.question: Based on your observations, how would you describe the student's reading comprehension?
skills_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

skills_3.question: Based on your observations, how would you describe the student's spelling?
skills_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

skills_4.question: Based on your observations, how would you describe the student's free or extended writing?
skills_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

skills_5.question: Based on your observations, how would you describe the student's fluency in Maths?
skills_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

skills_6.question: Based on your observations, how would you describe the student's oral expression?
skills_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

skills_7.question: Based on your observations, how would you describe the student's coordination and dexterity?
skills_7.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

prior_1.question: From the school's perspective, what is the main reason for this assessment?

metadata.section: Section D - Reason for Assessment & Prior Assessment

prior_2.question: To your knowledge, has the student previously been assessed by an Educational Psychologist?
prior_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section D - Reason for Assessment & Prior Assessment

prior_3.question: Please indicate any other professionals currently involved with the student (please select all that apply).
prior_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section D - Reason for Assessment & Prior Assessment

prior_4.question: Please indicate any existing diagnoses recorded on file (please select all that apply).
prior_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section D - Reason for Assessment & Prior Assessment

prior_5.question: Does the student have an Education, Health and Care Plan (EHCP) in place?
prior_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section D - Reason for Assessment & Prior Assessment

prior_6.question: Does the student have an Individual Education Plan (IEP) or Provision Plan in place?
prior_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section D - Reason for Assessment & Prior Assessment

behaviour_1.question: Which of the following best describes how the student generally presents at school on a day-to-day basis?

behaviour_2.question: Based on your observations, how would you describe the student's behaviour in general?
behaviour_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

behaviour_3.question: Based on your observations, how would you describe the student's behaviour during individual work?
behaviour_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

behaviour_4.question: Based on your observations, how would you describe the student's behaviour during small-group work?
behaviour_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

behaviour_5.question: Based on your observations, how would you describe the student's participation in group work?
behaviour_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

behaviour_6.question: Based on your observations, how would you describe the student's behaviour during lesson changeover and transitions?
behaviour_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

behaviour_7.question: To what extent do you have concerns about the student's understanding or spoken language?
behaviour_7.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

behaviour_8.question: To what extent do you have concerns about the student's social interaction with peers?
behaviour_8.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

behaviour_9.question: Based on your observations, how does the student typically spend free time or break time at school?

behaviour_10.question: To what extent is the student able to remain in the classroom and participate appropriately throughout the school day?

options.label: Always – Manages the full school day in the classroom
Sometimes –but regularly requires support, breaks, or time outside the classroom.

behaviour_10.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

behaviour_11.question: How frequently does the student need to make use of a quiet break-out space during the school day?
behaviour_11.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

behaviour_12.question: To what extent does the student experience difficulties with emotional regulation at school?
behaviour_12.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

cognitive_1.question: To what extent does the student experience difficulties with attention and concentration during lessons?
cognitive_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

cognitive_2.question: How frequently does the student appear to experience difficulties with memory or remembering information?
cognitive_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

cognitive_3.question: To what extent does the student experience difficulty copying information from the board or keeping pace with note-taking during lessons?
cognitive_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

cognitive_4.question: How consistently is the student able to follow multi-step verbal instructions?
cognitive_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

cognitive_5.question: How frequently does the student appear to run out of time during tests or examinations?
cognitive_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

cognitive_6.question: How consistently does the student hand homework in on time?
cognitive_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

cognitive_7.question: To what extent does the student experience difficulty managing lesson changeover, lockers, timetable or equipment?
cognitive_7.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

subjects_1.question: Which subjects or lessons does the student appear to find difficult?

subjects_2.question: Which subjects or lessons does the student appear to find easier or more manageable?

subjects_3.question: Please describe any particular strengths, abilities or interests you have observed in the student.

support_1.question: Which of the following best describes the type of support currently provided to the student?
support_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

support_2.question: How frequently is this support provided each week?
support_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

support_3.question: What is the typical length of each support session?
support_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

support_4.question: What is the typical group size in which support is provided?
support_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

support_5.question: To your knowledge, has the student been formally recognised as having difficulties with learning?
support_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

support_6.question: Is the student currently recorded on the school's Special Educational Needs and Disabilities (SEND) register?
support_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

access_1.question: Has the school identified the student as eligible for any examination access arrangements?
access_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

access_2.question: Does the student already use a laptop as their normal way of working in class?
access_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

access_3.question: Has the school commenced the Form 8 process for GCSE access arrangements?
access_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

access_4.question: Does the student use a word processor or computer to submit coursework or homework?
access_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

impact_1.question: To what extent does the student require ongoing supervision or reminders in order to complete homework?
impact_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

impact_2.question: To what extent does the student experience difficulties with organisation, such as managing equipment, kit or books?
impact_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

impact_3.question: Which of the following best describes how the student typically responds when they encounter difficulty?
impact_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

impact_4.question: How frequently does the student show signs of school avoidance or reluctance to attend?
impact_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

summary_1.question: Please share the most recent teacher feedback regarding the student, quoting directly where possible.

summary_2.question: Are any standardised internal scores available for the student (for example CAT4, MidYIS, NGRT or an SpLD screen)?
summary_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

summary_3.question: Is there anything further you consider relevant to this assessment?

closing_message.content: Thank you for completing the questionnaire. Your responses have been recorded and will be reviewed by the educational psychology team.

complete.content: Thank you so much for completing this assessment!
